title: Associate – Corporate Secretarial
metaDescription: Associate – Corporate Secretarial role in Singapore: support resolutions, statutory filings, and company records for a client portfolio.
description: Join our rapidly expanding team. We are looking for an experienced Associate to join our Corporate Secretarial Department in Singapore.
duties: Support the full spectrum of corporate secretarial work for a client portfolio.
Prepare resolutions, minutes, and statutory filings with ACRA.
Maintain statutory registers and company records accurately.
Assist with incorporations, striking off, and changes in company particulars.
Respond to client queries on routine compliance matters.
requirements: Diploma or Degree in Corporate Secretaryship, Business, or a related field.
Working knowledge of the Companies Act and ACRA requirements.
Organised, detail-oriented, and a good team player.
remuneration: Remuneration will be commensurate with qualifications and experience.
